data.title: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Dismisses Climate Predictions As 'Too Pessimistic,' Says We Have '20 Yrs Or So' To Fix The World
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk on Tuesday dismissed concerns of the Earth being rendered unlivable soon owing to climate change, saying that climate predictions are too "pessimistic" and "bound to backfire."

data.title: Elon Musk Refutes Rumors Of Buying Property Near Donald Trump's Mar-A-Lago: 'I'm Not Buying Or Building A House Anywhere'
data.description: Musk's denial of the property purchase near Mar-a-Lago is significant given his current role in the newly established Department of Government Efficiency.

data.title: Tesla Tops Nvidia And Apple In Innovation:  Analyst Sees Significant Market Cap Upside For Elon Musk-Led EV Giant
data.description: Gene Munster, managing partner at Deepwater Asset Management, declared Tesla as the most innovative company surpassing tech giants like Apple, Google, and Nvidia. Tesla's stock surged by 84%, attributed to renewed confidence in autonomy and future robotics. It is compared to other companies with market caps exceeding $2 trillion and Munster believes it has room to grow. The 'We, Robot' event showcased Tesla's autonomous driving capabilities with no safety incidents. Cathie Wood sees Tesla as the largest AI project on Earth. Gary Black raised the price target to $380, citing the potential launch of a $25,000-$30,000 hatchback model. In China, Tesla's sales are also notable. Tesla's stock performance is attributed to renewed confidence in autonomy and future robotics.

data.title: BMW Calls Tesla FSD 'Very Impressive,' Gary Black Says Automakers Will Eventually License It: 'One Deal Will Cause Others To Follow'
data.description: German automaker BMW on Tuesday applauded American EV giant Tesla Inc's full self-driving (FSD) driver assistance software's latest version, terming it "very impressive."
